# Awesome List PRs — Ready to Submit

Each section contains the exact content to paste when opening a PR.
Open each repo, edit README.md, and paste the entry in alphabetical order.

---

## 1. Awesome-LLM (github.com/Hannibal046/Awesome-LLM)

**Section:** `## 🧠 Agent / Memory`

**Entry to add:**
```markdown
- [CODEC-CORTEX](https://github.com/FidelErnesto03/codec-cortex) — Deterministic structural compression protocol for LLM agent cognitive memory. 85% less tokens via `.cortex` format with golden ratio memory distribution. ## Submission Tips
```

1. Always fork first, then edit README.md, then open PR
2. Keep entries short (1-2 lines max)
3. Include the GitHub link and a one-line description
4. Submit one PR per list (don't batch)
5. Wait 24-48h for review
